sglang.title: Disk FSM cache and adjust code.
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
A disk cache mechanism was applied, caching the most time-consuming part in the local storage.
I removed the unused code in tokenizer.py and built TransformersTokenizer at the beginning of ModelRpcServer to avoid some checking errors in the outlines code.
Aligned the fsm.py with outlines==0.0.24

vllm.title: Add `group` as an argument in broadcast ops
vllm.author: GindaChen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up with #2501.
Changes
In communication_ops.py, add group as an argument in the broadcast auxiliary function family. This helps designate the group to communicate (for example, a designated tensor-parallel group, or pipeline-parallel group) in the future.

vllm.title: [Fix] Keep `scheduler.running` as deque
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #2290 changed the scheduler seq group lists to be deques for more efficient updates, but missed one place where the running deque gets converted back to a list.
